rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited in the paper, providing details of the works referenced throughout the survey.
Discusses the importance of planning in autonomous agents, describes the limitations of conventional methods, and highlights the potential of LLMs for improving planning abiliti...
Introduces a taxonomy for LLM-based agent planning, categorizing works into task decomposition, multi-plan selection, external module-aided planning, reflection and refinement,...
Explores methods for reflection and refinement in LLM-Agent planning, including Self-refine, Reflexion, and CRITIC, emphasizing error correction and iterative improvement.
